column3:
Consultation required before IV administration

Detox IV drips deliver fluids, vitamins, antioxidants, and nutrients directly into the bloodstream to support liver function, boost hydration, and remove toxins. They offer faster, 100% absorption compared to oral supplements, targeting deeper toxin build-up from environmental stress or lifestyle factors. Options range from gentle to advanced, typically administered in 30-minute sessions to improve skin, energy, and overall health.

Key Aspects

  • Purpose: These drips aim to cleanse the body, support liver health, and enhance mental clarity.
  • Components: Formulations usually include tailored blends of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids designed to flush out toxins.
  • Effectiveness: Because they bypass the digestive system, IV drips allow for 100% absorption of nutrients, offering faster, more effective results than oral supplements.

Potential Benefits

  • Improved Energy: Helps with fatigue, burnout, and stress-related exhaustion.
  • Enhanced Skin: Promotes clearer, healthier-looking skin.
  • Immune System Support: Boosts immune function
column5: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Digestive Supplements

column3:
Consultation required before IV administration

Anti-ageing IV drips deliver a potent, direct-to-bloodstream blend of antioxidants like glutathione, vitamins (specifically Vitamin C), and sometimes NAD+ to combat oxidative stress and cellular damage. These 30-60 minute sessions aim to boost collagen production, improve skin elasticity, increase energy, and enhance overall rejuvenation. Benefits are often immediate, with effects lasting 4 to 6 weeks

Key components and benefits

  • Glutathione: Known as the "mother of all antioxidants," it fights free radicals, detoxifies, and reduces signs of aging.
  • Vitamin C & B Vitamins: Crucial for collagen production, skin elasticity, and repairing muscle tissue.
  • NAD+ (Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide): A coenzyme that promotes cellular regeneration, DNA repair, and mitochondrial health.
  • Amino Acids: Support skin firmness and tissue repair.
Targeted Effect
  • Cellular Repair: Enhanced energy levels and, in some cases, deep repair of cellular damage.
  • Wellness Boost: Strengthened immune system and reduced fatigue
  • Skin Rejuvenation: Reduced fine lines, increased hydration, and improved, radiant skin tone.

Treatment Details:

  • Procedure: A small cannula is inserted into a vein, typically in the arm, for direct nutrient absorption.
  • Session Time: Generally 30-60 minutes, though some intensive NAD+ protocols may last longer.
  • Frequency: Often recommended every 4-6 weeks for maintenance
column5: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Digestive Supplements

column3:
Consultation required before IV administration

The Mega V IV drip is a high-potency, intravenous infusion of vitamins, minerals, and amino acids (including B-complex, Magnesium, and Glutathione) designed to rapidly increase energy, boost immunity, and accelerate recovery from fatigue or intense exercise.

Key Detail

  • Key Ingredients: Often contains a high-dose mix of B-complex vitamins, amino acids (L-Arginine, L-Carnitine, L-Lysine), Taurine, Magnesium, and antioxidants like Glutathione and Acetylcysteine.
  • Purpose: Enhanced energy, immunity, stress reduction, and athletic recovery.
  • Duration: 30–60 minutes.
  • Frequency: Recommended once a week, though this varies

column3:
Consultation required before IV administration

The Myers' Cocktail is an intravenous (IV) nutrient therapy developed in the 1970s, designed to deliver high doses of vitamins and minerals directly into the bloodstream for improved absorption. It typically contains Vitamin C, B-complex vitamins, magnesium, and calcium to boost energy, enhance immunity, and manage chronic conditions.

Key Components and Purpose
  • Ingredients: Usually includes magnesium sulfate, calcium, B vitamins (B12, B6, B5, B-complex), Vitamin C, and sometimes glutathione or zinc.
  • Purpose: Aimed at treating conditions like chronic fatigue, migraines, fibromyalgia, acute muscle spasms, and upper respiratory tract infections.
  • Administration: Delivered via IV over 30–60 minutes, bypassing the digestive system for higher, immediate bioavailability.

Benefits: Increased energy, enhanced immunity, reduced stress, and improved mental clarity.
column5: Health & Beauty > Health Care > Fitness & Nutrition > Vitamins & Supplements > Digestive Supplements

column2: Glutathione and Vitamin C IV drip
column3:
Consultation required before IV administration

An intravenous (IV) drip combining glutathione and Vitamin C offers enhanced benefits due to their synergistic effect, primarily in antioxidant protection, detoxification, immune system support, and skin health. This method ensures maximum absorption by bypassing the digestive system

Key Benefits

  • Powerful Antioxidant Protection: Glutathione, the "master antioxidant," and Vitamin C work together to neutralize free radicals, which cause cellular damage and premature aging. They also help regenerate each other, amplifying their protective capabilities.
  • Enhanced Detoxification: Glutathione is crucial for the liver's detoxification processes, helping eliminate environmental toxins, heavy metals, and metabolic waste. Vitamin C further supports liver function, making the body more efficient at cleansing harmful substances.
  • Immune System Support: Both nutrients are vital for a robust immune system. Vitamin C enhances white blood cell production and function, while glutathione maintains immune cell health, helping the body fight infections more effectively.
  • Skin Brightening and Anti-Aging: This is one of the most popular benefits.
    • Glutathione inhibits the enzyme tyrosinase, which is responsible for melanin production, leading to a brighter, more even skin tone and reduced hyperpigmentation (dark spots, acne scars, melasma).
    • Vitamin C is essential for collagen synthesis, which improves skin elasticity and firmness, reducing fine lines and wrinkles.
    • Together, they protect the skin from UV damage and pollution, promoting a radiant and youthful appearance.
  • Increased Energy and Reduced Fatigue: By supporting mitochondrial function (the cell's powerhouses) and reducing oxidative stress, the combination can boost energy levels and improve physical and mental stamina, reducing symptoms of chronic fatigue.
  • Anti-Inflammatory Action: Chronic inflammation is linked to various health conditions. The combined antioxidant therapy helps reduce inflammatory markers, benefiting overall health and conditions like acne, eczema, and psoriasis.
  • Faster Recovery: The treatment aids in faster recovery from strenuous exercise or illness by reducing muscle soreness, speeding up tissue repair, and enhancing the immune response.
  • Enhanced Brain Health: Neuroprotective benefits include improved memory, focus, and mental clarity by protecting brain cells from oxidative damage

column3:
A carbon peel facial is a non-invasive skin treatment using liquid carbon and laser energy to deeply cleanse pores, exfoliate dead skin, and stimulate collagen, improving texture, tone, acne, fine lines, and pigmentation with minimal downtime, making it great for dull, oily, or acne-prone skin. The carbon draws out impurities, and the laser heats the deeper skin layers, promoting rejuvenation and collagen production for smoother, brighter skin.

Core Benefits:

  • Deep Cleansing & Exfoliation: The carbon mask acts as a magnet for oil and impurities, which the laser then vaporises along with dead skin cells.
  • Pore Minimization: The heat from the laser stimulates the inner walls of the pores to contract, making them appear smaller and more refined.
  • Acne Management: The laser's thermal energy destroys acne-causing bacteria and shrinks sebaceous glands to reduce excess oil production.
  • Anti-Ageing: Thermal energy reaches the dermis to stimulate collagen and elastin production, helping to soften fine lines and firm the skin.
  • Immediate Results: Most patients notice a "Hollywood glow" and smoother texture immediately after a single 30-minute session.

Treatment Procedure

A session takes approximately 30 to 45 minutes and follows these steps:

  1. Preparation: The skin is thoroughly cleansed of surface oils.
  2. Carbon Application: A thin layer of liquid carbon is applied and left to dry for about 10 minutes, allowing it to penetrate deep into pores.
  3. Laser Pass 1 (Heating): A low-energy laser pass heats the carbon to bind it to the skin's surface and stimulate deeper tissue.
  4. Laser Pass 2 (Vaporization): A higher-energy Q-switched laser is used to shatter the carbon particles, taking all trapped debris and impurities with them.
  5. Aftercare: A hydrating moisturizer and broad-spectrum SPF 30+ or 50 are applied to protect the fresh skin.


Post-Treatment & Maintenance

  • Course of Treatment: While one session provides an instant boost, professionals recommend a course of 4 to 6 sessions spaced 2 to 4 weeks apart for optimal, long-term results.
  • Downtime: There is typically no recovery period. Mild redness or a tingling sensation may occur but usually fades within a few hours.
  • Pre-Care: Avoid sun exposure, retinoids, and exfoliating products for 3–5 days before your appointment.

column3:
After making the purchase, please call us to book the class.

Course overview

An excellent salon treatment, not only giving your client some ‘me time’, but also enhancing their beauty with fresh and glowing skin.

This course is covered in one practical training day. You will learn the theory of the treatment as well as carry out practical assessments on live models.

Practical is carried out using a model that allows you the maximum time during the training to work upon acquiring and demonstrating the required technique.

You will cover the following on the course:

• Contra-indications
• Contra-actions
• Understanding the kit required to carry out the treatment
• How to successfully carry out the treatment on a live model
• The aftercare required for your client
• Health and Safety in the workplace and salon environment (recap only)
• Anatomy and Physiology of the skin (recap only)
• Practical delivery of the treatment on a live model
• Aftercare advice

Course prerequisite

You will need to have a facial qualification. You will be provided with pre-course reading which will cover basic anatomy and physiology, and health and safety. This will be recapped in your session. Please check your insurance company in case they require you to have any other qualifications.

Course cost

This course costs £350 (no kit included). Everything you need in your practical assessment is provided on the day.

Course benefits and progression route

A hydrofacial is a multi-step facial treatment that combines deep cleansing, exfoliation, extractions, tightening and skin rejuvenation. This can be performed as one treatment or you can offer mini treatments using single modes.

Other courses you may be interested in following on from this course are Dermaplaning, Chemical Peels, Micro-needling and Indian Head Massage.

Start your beauty therapy career with an Internationally recognised VTCT qualification.

The Level 2 NVQ Diploma in Beauty Therapy (General) is the perfect starting point for those new to the beauty industry. This internationally recognised VTCT qualification provides the essential practical skills, theoretical knowledge, and professional confidence required to begin working in salons, spas, or to start your own beauty business.
column5: Services > Personal Services > Beauty & Personal Care
column49: Assessment is carried out through practical observations, written assignments, and completion of case studies. Students will build a professional portfolio of evidence in line with VTCT qualification requirements. Final exams may take place approximately 4–6 weeks after the training period.
column50: This course runs over approximately 14 weeks, delivered one day per week. Classes take place from 10:00 AM to 5 PM. Additional assessment and exam dates will be scheduled following completion of the training period.
column51:
Courses run regularly throughout the year at Pink Beauty & Aesthetics Academy. With no minimum class size required, students can begin their training without unnecessary delays. Please contact the academy for the latest availability.

• Health and safety  
• Promote additional services or products to customers

column53: This course is ideal for beginners 16+ and those new to the beauty industry. No prior beauty qualification is required. Students should be prepared to complete practical assessments, case studies, and portfolio work as part of the qualification.

How does it work?
The Lemon Bottle solution is injected directly into the fatty tissue, where it works to break down fat cells. These cells are then naturally eliminated from the body over time.

Lemon Bottle Fat Dissolving Injections can target various areas, including the face, chin, arms, bra line, hips, stomach, and thighs. This makes it a versatile solution for those looking to reduce fat in specific areas of their body.

column3:
This fast-acting multi-retinoid serum visibly reduces the four signs of skin ageing in just 2 weeks*. Gentle enough for nightly use, this high-dose retinol serum features a 3.5% Retinoid Complex + soothing Squalane to minimise the appearance of pores, smooth texture for softer skin, even tone, and reverse the look of wrinkles.

Use 2 times a week, a few days apart, for the first two weeks, applying only at night. Increase to alternate nights for another 2 weeks, building to use nightly. If you have been using a retinoid product comfortably, you may introduce it nightly straight away. During the day, always use SPF to help protect your skin against UV exposure.

This product contains retinol, a form of Vitamin A. Suitable for oily, combination and normal skin types. Can be applied on both the face and neck. Avoid the eye area. Temporary redness, flakiness, peeling and sensitivity may occur. These reactions are normal and will fade over time. Use sunscreen during the day. If irritation persists, discontinue use and seek advice from a professional skin therapist. If you are pregnant or breastfeeding, please consult a physician before use.

*Clinical results with 30 volunteers on reduced appearance of wrinkles, pores, dark spots, and uneven texture in 2 weeks test.

column3:
Embark on a transformative journey in the world of semi-permanent cosmetics with our Advanced Microblading to Machine Course. This comprehensive and hands-on training program is designed for experienced microblading artists looking to elevate their skills to the next level by seamlessly integrating machine techniques into their repertoire.

Course Highlights:

  1. Mastering Machine Techniques: Dive deep into the intricacies of machine-based procedures, learning how to create flawless, natural-looking eyebrow enhancements with precision and efficiency. Our expert instructors will guide you through the nuances of machine work, ensuring you gain confidence in handling and controlling the device for optimal results.

  2. Advanced Brow Design: Explore advanced brow design principles, understanding facial anatomy, and honing your ability to customize eyebrow shapes that complement individual features. Learn how to enhance and accentuate unique facial characteristics while maintaining a harmonious and natural appearance.

  3. Color Theory and Pigment Selection: Gain insights into color theory and pigment selection for machine-based procedures. Understand how to achieve the perfect color match, address pigment retention issues, and create bespoke pigment blends to suit diverse client needs.

  4. Client Consultation and Communication: Enhance your client consultation and communication skills to ensure a thorough understanding of client expectations, skin types, and lifestyle factors. Learn how to manage client expectations and provide tailored recommendations for the best possible outcomes.

  5. Advanced Techniques for Correction and Enhancement: Acquire advanced correction and enhancement techniques to address previous microblading work, faded pigment, or asymmetry. Learn how to troubleshoot common issues and achieve optimal results through meticulous correction processes.

  6. Health and Safety Protocols: Prioritize client safety by mastering the latest health and safety protocols related to machine-based procedures. Understand the importance of maintaining a sterile environment, proper equipment sterilization, and post-procedure care.

  7. Live Demonstrations and Hands-On Practice: Witness live demonstrations by seasoned professionals and engage in hands-on practice sessions to reinforce your learning. Benefit from personalized feedback and guidance as you apply your newfound skills in a supportive and controlled learning environment.

  8. Business and Marketing Strategies: Develop strategies to market your expanded skill set and attract a broader client base. Explore business considerations, pricing models, and effective marketing techniques to establish yourself as a sought-after expert in the industry.

By the end of our Advanced Microblading to Machine Course, you'll emerge as a skilled and versatile artist capable of delivering exceptional results through a combination of microblading and machine techniques. Elevate your career, expand your clientele, and stay at the forefront of the evolving world of permanent cosmetics. Enroll now and unlock the potential to create breathtaking and enduring beauty for your clients.
